crime.value: Espionage and treason: Army cryptographer Pyotr Yablokov accused of espionage during Russo-Turkish War, facing imprisonment and execution; central question: who is the real culprit?
crime.quote: when Yablokov is accused of espionage and faces imprisonment and execution, Varya must turn to Fandorin to find the real culprit

victim.value: Pyotr Yablokov, army cryptographer and fiancé of Varya Suvorova; 'killable' due to his sensitive military position and access to encrypted communications during wartime

closed_world.value: Russian Army of the Danube during 1877 Russo-Turkish War on the Bulgarian front; military hierarchy and field army structure containing suspects and witnesses
closed_world.quote: It is 1877, and war has broken out between Russia and the Ottoman Empire... Amid the treacherous atmosphere of a nineteenth-century Russian field army

investigator.value: Erast Fandorin, former diplomat and detective; investigates the case through partnership with Varya Suvorova, who initially distrusts him but must rely on his deductive skills
investigator.quote: former diplomat and detective extraordinaire Erast Fandorin finds his most confounding case
